title: guettardella surigaoensis
intro: Guettardella surigaoensis is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the Philippines and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory problems, thanks to its rich content of bioactive compounds. Guettardella surigaoensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
